description: Style Note This season's french connection line features bold animal prints in bags with a fantastical burst of colour in the high street brand's attitudinal style. Add to this potent mix a simplistic design and minimalistic hardware and we have this lust-worthy piece, perfect to add that refined facelift  to your season wardrobe.  Product Details Faux cheetah print upper on a dull blue grey clutch bag that has a zipped pocket inside Has a short looped handle on one side and brand badge on the front Material and Care 100% polyester Wipe with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Size Height: 14 cm Width: 30 cm
